Bending [something] until it breaks.action_anchor: A person bends [something] until it snaps.

Closing [something].action_anchor: A hand moves to bring two parts of an object together, reducing an opening.

opening fully closes with parts meeting

Covering [something] with [something].action_anchor: A hand places an object over another object to obscure it.

Dropping [something] behind [something].action_anchor: A person releases an object so it falls behind another object.
phase_cues: hand holds object above background object

Dropping [something] in front of [someth.action_anchor: A hand releases an object that falls downward in front of another object.

Dropping [something] into [something].action_anchor: A hand releases an object that falls into a container.

Folding [something].action_anchor: A person bends a flexible object into a smaller shape.

Holding [something].action_anchor: A person's hand is in contact with and supporting an object.
phase_cues: hand makes contact and encloses object
object is lifted or held steady

Holding [something] next to [something].action_anchor: A person holds an object close to another object without touching it.
phase_cues: object lifted and positioned near target
held steady in proximity to target

Letting [something] roll along a flat su.action_anchor: A hand releases an object that rolls forward on a flat surface.
phase_cues: object rolls forward without hand contact

Letting [something] roll down a slanted.action_anchor: A person releases an object on an inclined surface, and it rolls downward.

object rolls down slope without assistance

Lifting a surface with [something] on it.action_anchor: A person lifts a surface with [something] on it, but the surface tilts only slightly, not enough for the object to slide off.
phase_cues: object stays in place on surface

Lifting [something] with [something] on.action_anchor: A person raises an object that has another object resting on top of it.

arms extend upward lifting both objects together
objects reach elevated position with top still supported

Moving away from [something] with your c.action_anchor: The camera steadily recedes from a fixed object or scene.

Moving [something] across a surface unti.action_anchor: A hand pushes an object across a flat surface until it goes over the edge and drops.

Moving [something] and [something] close.action_anchor: A person brings two objects toward each other until they touch or nearly touch.

person moves objects toward each other simultaneously
objects make contact or stop close together

Moving [something] and [something] so th.action_anchor: A person moves two objects toward each other until they make contact.

Moving [something] down.action_anchor: A hand pushes an object downward.
phase_cues: Hand makes contact and pushes downward.
Object settles at a lower position.

Moving [something] up.action_anchor: A hand lifts an object upward from a lower position.
phase_cues: Hand reaches toward object at rest.
Hand grasps and lifts object upward.
Object is held or placed at higher position.

Plugging [something] into [something].action_anchor: A hand inserts a plug into a socket.
phase_cues: Plug tip aligning with socket hole.

Poking a hole into [something soft].action_anchor: A finger pushes into a soft surface, creating a small indentation.

Poking [something] so lightly that it do.action_anchor: A finger or object gently touches [something] with minimal force.

Poking [something] so that it falls over.action_anchor: A finger or stick makes contact with an object, causing it to tip over.

Pouring [something] into [something].action_anchor: A person tilts a container to transfer liquid into another container.

container tilted causing liquid to pour out
container returned to upright position after pouring

Pouring [something] into [something] unt.action_anchor: A person tilts a container to pour liquid into another until it spills over the rim.
phase_cues: person holds source container above target

Pouring [something] onto [something].action_anchor: A person tilts a container to transfer liquid onto a surface.

Pretending to be tearing [something that.action_anchor: A person holds an object with both hands and makes tearing motions without actual separation.

hands pull in opposite directions with tension
object remains whole despite pulling motion

Pretending to close [something] without.action_anchor: A person's hand moves toward [something] as if to close it but stops short of contact.

Pretending to pick [something] up.action_anchor: A person mimes grasping and lifting an invisible object.

fingers curl as if grasping an object
arm lifts upward with imaginary weight

Pretending to put [something] next to [s.action_anchor: A person holds an object and moves it toward another object without making contact.

Pretending to spread air onto [something.action_anchor: A person mimes spreading air onto [something] with hands.

Pretending to take [something] out of [s.action_anchor: A person mimes removing an object from a container without actual contact.

hand pulls back as if holding object

Pulling [something] onto [something].action_anchor: A person pulls [something] onto [something] with visible tension.

Pulling two ends of [something] so that.action_anchor: A person pulls both ends of an object away from each other, elongating it.

arms extend outward, pulling ends apart

Pulling two ends of [something] so that.action_anchor: A person pulls two ends of [something] until it separates into two pieces.

Pushing [something] from left to right.action_anchor: A hand or object moves [something] horizontally from left to right.

Pushing [something] off of [something].action_anchor: A hand pushes an object off a supporting surface.

Pushing [something] so that it falls off.action_anchor: A hand pushes [something] until it falls off the table edge.

object falls off table to floor

Pushing [something] so that it slightly.action_anchor: A hand contacts an object and applies force, causing it to shift a small distance.

Force is applied, object begins to move slightly.

Putting [number of] [something] onto [so.action_anchor: A hand places [number of] [something] onto the surface of [something].

Putting [something] and [something] on t.action_anchor: A hand places [something] and [something] onto a table surface.

Putting [something] onto a slanted surfa.action_anchor: A person puts [something] onto a slanted surface where it remains stationary.

object remains in place without sliding

Putting [something] onto [something].action_anchor: A hand places an object onto a supporting surface.

Putting [something similar to other thin.action_anchor: A hand places an object onto a table near other similar objects.

Showing a photo of [something] to the ca.action_anchor: A person holds a photo toward the camera lens.

Showing [something] behind [something].action_anchor: A person holds an object and moves it to reveal something behind another object.

[Something] colliding with [something] a.action_anchor: Two objects collide and bounce away from each other.

Spilling [something] next to [something].action_anchor: A liquid flows from a container and lands adjacent to an object.

Spilling [something] onto [something].action_anchor: A liquid or granular substance flows unintentionally from a container onto another surface.

Spinning [something] that quickly stops.action_anchor: A person spins an object and it abruptly halts.

Spreading [something] onto [something].action_anchor: A hand moves a spreadable substance across a surface with a spreading tool.

Squeezing [something].action_anchor: A hand compresses an object inward.

Fingers wrap around object and apply pressure.

Stuffing [something] into [something].action_anchor: A person pushes an object into a container until it fits inside.

Taking [something] from [somewhere].action_anchor: A hand reaches toward and grasps an object from a location.

Tearing [something] into two pieces.action_anchor: A person holds an object with both hands and pulls in opposite directions until it separates into two parts.

Tilting [something] with [something] on.action_anchor: A person tilts [something] with [something] on it slightly to prevent it from falling.

Tilting [something] with [something] on.action_anchor: A person tilts [something] with [something] on it until the top object falls off.

Tipping [something] with [something in i.action_anchor: A person tilts [something] until its contents spill out.

Turning the camera downwards while filmi.action_anchor: The camera tilts downward while filming [something].

Turning the camera left while filming [s.action_anchor: A person rotates a camera horizontally to the left while filming.

Turning the camera upwards while filming.action_anchor: The camera lens points upward while filming [something].

Twisting (wringing) [something] wet unti.action_anchor: A person twists a wet object with both hands until water drips out.

Twisting [something].action_anchor: A hand rotates an object around its axis.

Uncovering [something].action_anchor: A hand moves an object aside to reveal what is underneath.

Approaching [something] with your camera.action_anchor: A camera moves steadily closer to a target object or scene.

Digging [something] out of [something].action_anchor: A person uses a tool to remove an object from a container or ground.

Dropping [something] next to [something].action_anchor: A hand releases an object, letting it fall to rest beside another object.
